part1.title: Multiple-choice cloze
part1.description: Read the text and choose the correct word for each gap.
part1.text: The digital revolution has (1) ______ the way we communicate. Gone are the days when we had to wait weeks for a letter to arrive. Today, we can send messages instantly across the globe. However, this immediacy comes at a (2) ______. We now expect instant responses, which can create (3) ______ in both personal and professional relationships.
